message:
docs(plan): 10 surgical fixes based on selective feedback review

Accepted improvements from external feedback review:

**Critical Bug Fixes:**
- Fix build_id vs run_id split in AutonomousOrchestrator::run (resume was broken)
- Fix confidence scoring denominator (use applies_count, not instances.len())

**Checkpoint System:**
- Add idempotency fields: processed_session_hashes, config_snapshot,
  algorithm_version, random_seed

**Quality & Validation:**
- Add counterexamples as first-class output with CounterExampleReason enum
- Sharpen uncertainty queue with DecisionBoundary and MissingSignal
- Improve steady-state detection with quality/evidence delta guards

**Session Marks:**
- Make highlights topic-scoped (first-class objects with HighlightType enum)
- Enable precise topic→evidence mapping for generalization

**Safety System:**
- Add effect-based classification (CommandEffect enum) instead of string patterns
- More robust: classifies by what command DOES, not what it looks like

**Token Packing:**
- Add packing invariants with mandatory_slices (MandatorySlice, MandatoryPredicate)
- Add PackError for fail-fast when mandatory slices can't fit

Rejected: runtime reframing, tree-sitter suggestion (already pluggable),
two-stage search (already in plan), cheap prefilter (premature optimization)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
